title: Tidy-Up Time
lesson: Putting your toys away keeps your room tidy and happy.
prompts: In a cozy child's bedroom — a small bed against the back wall, a low toy shelf, no sofa or television — with toys scattered everywhere, building blocks, a teddy bear and picture books spread across the floor, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands among the toys with one hand on their cheek, looking around at the mess with an overwhelmed expression. Medium shot at eye level, warm light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

In a cozy child's bedroom — a small bed against the back wall, a low toy shelf, no sofa or television — toys scattered across the floor and a colourful toy box nearby, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands in the mid-ground, holding a single toy and unsure where to begin, with an unsure expression. In the foreground, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_PARENT} kneels beside the colourful toy box and gestures gently toward the scattered toys, suggesting it is time to tidy up. Make the interaction read physically: each person faces the other person or the shared object, with hands and gaze directed to one connected action. Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

In a cozy child's bedroom — a small bed against the back wall, a low toy shelf, no sofa or television — toys still scattered around and a colourful toy box nearby, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image is alone, kneeling on the floor to pick up building blocks, a small determined smile on their face. Eye-level medium shot, warm light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

In a cozy child's bedroom — a small bed against the back wall, a low toy shelf, no sofa or television — now half-tidied, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image is kneeling, dropping a teddy bear into a colourful toy box, with a focused, cooperative expression. Nearby, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_PARENT} kneels and places picture books onto the low shelf, smiling encouragingly. Make the interaction read physically: each person faces the other person or the shared object, with hands and gaze directed to one connected action. Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

In a cozy child's bedroom — a small bed against the back wall, a low toy shelf, no sofa or television — now neat and tidy, the bed made, all the toys put away, the floor clear, the toy box closed and the books lined up on the shelf, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands with both hands on their hips, looking around the clean bright room, with a happy expression. Medium shot at eye level, warm light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

In a cozy child's bedroom — a small bed against the back wall, a low toy shelf, no sofa or television — now tidy and bright with all the toys put away, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands, with a proud, beaming smile, hands on hips. Nearby, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_PARENT} stands beside them clapping happily and looking proud. Make the interaction read physically: each person faces the other person or the shared object, with hands and gaze directed to one connected action. Eye-level medium-wide shot, the clean room glows with warm light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}
gists: In a cozy child's bedroom strewn with toys, blocks, a teddy and books across the floor, the child stands alone among the mess, hand on cheek, looking around at the messy room.
In the messy bedroom, the child holds a single toy, unsure where to begin, while the mother kneels by a colourful toy box gesturing at the scattered toys — it's tidy-up time.
In the bedroom still scattered with toys, the child kneels alone picking up blocks with a determined little smile, starting to tidy.
In the half-tidied bedroom, the child drops a teddy into the toy box while the mother places books on the low shelf — they tidy as a team.
In the now neat and tidy bedroom (bed made, floor clear, toys away), the child stands alone with hands on hips, looking around the clean bright room, happy.
In the tidy bright bedroom, the child stands proudly with hands on hips while the mother claps happily beside them — a tidy room, a proud child.
texts: Uh oh — {NAME}'s room was a big mess! Toys, books and blocks lay all over the floor. "Oh dear," said {NAME}, looking around.
"It's tidy-up time," said Mum, pointing to the toy box with a gentle smile. "All of it?" asked {NAME}. "We can do it together," said Mum.
{NAME} started picking up the blocks, one by one. "I can do this!" said {NAME}, dropping them in with a clatter.
{NAME} popped the teddy in the box while Mum lined up the books. "We make a great team!" said Mum. "Almost done!" said {NAME}.
Soon every single toy was put away. {NAME}'s room was neat and bright! {NAME} looked all around. "Wow, it's so clean!"
"You did it!" cheered Mum, clapping. {NAME} stood tall and proud. "A tidy room is a happy room!" said {NAME}.
